config.title: Promocja #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50200"
'choose_opakowanie_lp_where #include "50606"
dim g_produkt dim g_opak dim g_ilosc dim g_first dim g_mask : g_mask = "" dim g_data : g_data = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() dim g_gwar : g_gwar = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
function fopen()
'tytuł strony if trans_.isvar(1) then page_.topelement.title = cstr(trans_.var(1)) end if
'blokowanie kontrolki z numerem pierwszym if trans_.isvar(2) then if trans_.var(2) = 0 then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FIRST).disable = true end if else DEBUG_MESSAGE("THIS_FILE: default values") end if
'blokowanie wyboru produktu/opakowania if trans_.isvar(3) then if trans_.var(3) = 0 then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_WYROB).disable = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OPAK).disable = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_WYROB_PIC).disable = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OPAK_PIC).disable = true end if else DEBUG_MESSAGE("THIS_FILE: default values") end if
'blokowanie daty produkcji if trans_.isvar(4) then if trans_.var(4) = 0 then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DATPROD).disable = true end if else DEBUG_MESSAGE("THIS_FILE: default values") end if
'blokowanie daty produkcji if trans_.isvar(5) then if trans_.var(5) = 0 then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GWAR).disable = true end if else DEBUG_MESSAGE("THIS_FILE: default values") end if
fopen = true end function
function collect_data(byref pProdukt , byref pOpak , byref nIle , byref nFirst):collect_data = false set pProdukt = g_produkt set pOpak = g_opak nIle = g_ilosc nFirst = g_first collect_data = not pProdukt is nothing and not pOpak is nothing and nIle > 0 end function
function collect_data_ex(byref pProdukt , byref pOpak , byref nIle , byref nFirst , byref maska , byref data , byref gwarancja):collect_data_ex = false maska = g_mask if maska = "" then MessageBox "Nie podano maski numeru seryjnego.", "Egzemplarze", vbOkOnly, vbInformation trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Brak maski numeru seryjnego" end if data = g_data gwarancja = g_gwar collect_data_ex = collect_data(pProdukt,pOpak,nIle,nFirst) and maska <> "" DEBUG_MESSAGE("collect_data_ex="+cstr(collect_data_ex)) end function
function choose_params( byval pProdukt , byval pOpak , ile, byval nFirstNum): choose_params = false set g_produkt = pProdukt set g_opak = pOpak g_ilosc = clng(ile) g_first = nFirstNum choose_params = (page_.domodalauto() = CMD_CHOICE) end function
function choose_params_def(byval pProdukt, byval pOpak, ile, byval nFirstNum) : choose_params_def = false set g_produkt = pProdukt set g_opak = pOpak g_ilosc = clng(ile) g_first = nFirstNum choose_params_def = true end function
function choose_params_ex ( byval pProdukt , byval pOpak , byval ile , byval nFirstNum , byval maska , byval data , byval gwarancja): choose_params_ex = false g_mask = maska g_data = data g_gwar = gwarancja choose_params_ex = choose_params( pProdukt , pOpak , ile , nFirstNum ) end function
function on_ok()
if not (not g_produkt is nothing and not g_opak is nothing and g_ilosc > 0 ) then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Generowanie etykiet - niekompletne dane (brak opakowania, produktu lub zerowa ilość)" exit function end if
page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end function
function on_cancel() page_.result = 0 page_.goback end function
function c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = clng(g_ilosc) c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ongetdata=true end function
function c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_ilosc = newValue c##CTRLID_ILOSC##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_FIRST##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_first c##CTRLID_FIRST##_ongetdata=true end function
function c##CTRLID_FIRST##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_first = newValue c##CTRLID_FIRST##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_WYROB##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) if (not g_produkt is nothing) then oCtrl.value = g_produkt.text else oCtrl.value = "Wybierz wyrób --->" end if c##CTRLID_WYROB##_ongetdata=true end function
function c##CTRLID_WYROB##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) if (newValue="") then set g_produkt = nothing set g_opak = nothing end if c##CTRLID_WYROB##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_OPAK##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) if (not g_opak is nothing) then oCtrl.value = g_opak.text else oCtrl.value = "Wybierz opakowanie --->" end if c##CTRLID_OPAK##_ongetdata=true end function
function c##CTRLID_OPAK##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) if (newValue="") then set g_opak = nothing end if c##CTRLID_OPAK##_ondataentered = true end function
function std_choose_prod(hli) dim lp set g_produkt = doc_.getmodule(60271).choose_produkt_obj("" , "" , lp) if not g_produkt is nothing then set g_opak = g_produkt.listOpakowania.get(1) if lp > 0 then set g_opak = g_produkt.listOpakowania.get(lp) end if end if end function
function std_choose_opak(byref hli)
if g_produkt is nothing then exit function end if dim lp_opak: lp_opak = choose_opakowanie_lp(g_produkt) if lp_opak <> 0 then set g_opak = g_produkt.listOpakowania.get( lp_opak ) end if
end function
function c##CTRLID_NRSER_MASK##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_mask c##CTRLID_NRSER_MASK##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_NRSER_MASK##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_mask = newValue c##CTRLID_NRSER_MASK##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_DATPROD##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_data c##CTRLID_DATPROD##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_DATPROD##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_data = newValue c##CTRLID_DATPROD##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRLID_GWAR##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_gwar c##CTRLID_GWAR##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_GWAR##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_gwar = newValue c##CTRLID_GWAR##_ondataentered = true end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Wyrób,1)
QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(CTRLID_WYROB_PIC, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT,varFunctionHLI="std_choose_prod", Wybór produktu)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Opakowanie ,1)
QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(CTRLID_OPAK_PIC, PICTURE_CHOICE_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU,varFunctionHLI="std_choose_opak", Wybór opakowania)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Ilość ,1)
QXE_INT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_ILOSC,10)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Zacznij od numeru: ,1)
QXE_INT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_FIRST,10)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Maska numeru: ,1)
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_NRSER_MASK,30)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Data produkcji: ,1)
QXE_DATE_FIELD_CUSTOM(CTRLID_DATPROD)
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Termin gwarancji: ,1)
QXE_DATE_FIELD_CUSTOM(CTRLID_GWAR)
QXX_NUM_FORMAT_DESC(2)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
QXF_END
XFCANCELOKBUTTONS(on_ok,on_cancel)
